<!-- source-hash: 58b8c6e2663f3f707215fbe82144586e -->
A paginated response DTO for returning a list of events, wrapping event data alongside pagination metadata.

## Key Components

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `events` | `List<EventResponse>` | Collection of event records |
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo` | Pagination metadata (page number, size, totals) |

## Usage Example

```java
// Building a paginated events response
List<EventResponse> eventList = eventService.getEvents(page, size);

PageInfo pageInfo = PageInfo.builder()
    .page(page)
    .size(size)
    .totalElements(eventService.countEvents())
    .build();

EventsResponse response = EventsResponse.builder()
    .events(eventList)
    .pageInfo(pageInfo)
    .build();

return ResponseEntity.ok(response);
```
